data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for warranty tracking on parts and labor. However, the evidence does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement has been fulfilled. The linked use case mentions warranty tracking, but there is no specific evidence demonstrating that this functionality has been implemented or validated in the current saga run, leading to a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of warranty tracking functionality for parts and labor.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
